posts.author: robstable (Rob)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’m getting an error in Zapier when attempting to update item status column value.

This is what we are attempting to do. Email notifications come ranging from 1-4.

Notification email 1 comes in and zapier creates a new record in monday,

for notification emails 2,3,4, we’d like to have zapier update that item in Monday.

Screen Shot 2020-08-03 at 5.51.11 PM1690×1318 203 KB

Screen Shot 2020-08-03 at 6.02.58 PM494×650 30.6 KB

If I change item ID to one that previous was created, the zap goes through, so I’m not quite sure what the error means, or what I need to change.

Thanks,
Rob

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @robstable, thanks for posting and welcome to the community!

Have you already checked out these Zapier JSON Formatting Examples?

If you have and it’s still not working for you, I would recommend posting here: FAQs - No-Code (Zapier, Integromat, etc) - monday Community Forum

posts.author: Jess-Robertson (JESSICA ROBERTSON)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @robstable did you ever get this figured out? Did you make a new post on the community? I’m having this exact issue, and I don’t want to start a whole new topic post if you were able to get it resolved previously ^-^

Thanks!
